meta.title: Contact Ingrid Ascanio — Miami Mortgage Loan Originator
meta.description: Call, text, email, or book a call with Miami mortgage loan originator Ingrid Ascanio. Same-day response on new inquiries. Se habla español.

hero.title: Start the conversation.
hero.body: Two easy ways to start: book a 15-minute call at a time that suits you, or leave your details and Ingrid will call you — within one business day, usually much faster. Prefer to talk right now? Call or text and skip the form entirely.

form.title: Have Ingrid call you
form.name: Full name
interestOptions: I'm buying from outside the U.S.
form.message: Anything you'd like me to know?
form.messagePh: Timeline, questions, the situation as you see it — anything helps.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted by phone, text, or email about my inquiry. Message and data rates may apply. Consent is not a condition of purchase.

direct.title: Or reach me directly
direct.callDesc: Fastest for anything urgent — offer deadlines, same-day pre-approval letters.
direct.emailDesc: Best for documents and detailed questions.
direct.bookDesc: Pick a time that suits you — 15 minutes, no preparation needed.
